_description: YouTube Shorts technique demos for Amy's exercise library. Primary source: Renaissance Periodization (Dr. Mike Israetel). Fallback: Jeff Nippard, Squat University.
_coverage: 18/22 exercises linked. 4 missing: Glute Bridge, Hang Snatch, Cable Kickbacks, DB Front Raise (needs verification).

Barbell Back Squat.title: Do You Have A Perfect Squat? (Find Out)

Barbell Bench Press.title: How To Bench Press With Perfect Technique (5 Steps)

Bicep Curl.title: The CRAZY Bicep Curl you DON'T Know!

Barbell Chest Press.title: Avoid Injury on the BENCH PRESS

Single Leg RDL.title: How to do RDLs PROPERLY for Hypertrophy
Single Leg RDL._note: General RDL technique — best available from RP. No single-leg-specific Short exists.

Hang Snatch._note: No hang snatch technique Short found. RP has Olympic lifting content as full-length videos, not Shorts. Nippard doesn't cover Olympic lifts.

Lat Pulldown.title: How To Do a PERFECT Lat Pulldown

Tricep Extension (bent over).title: The Worst Triceps Mistake Everyone Is Making
Tricep Extension (bent over)._note: Covers triceps kickback technique and the controversy around it. RP only has a critique Short, not a technique demo.

Cable Kickbacks._note: Cable glute kickback. Neither RP nor Nippard have a dedicated Short. Nippard has a full-length video (7:13) but not Shorts format.

Leg Extension.title: A Better Way To Do Leg Extensions

DB Shoulder Press.title: The PERFECT Dumbbell Shoulder Press (DO THIS!)

DB Front Raise.title: How to do Standing Dumbbell Front Raises!

Glute Bridge._note: No dedicated glute bridge technique Short on RP or Nippard. RP has general glute training Shorts but not a bridge-specific technique demo. The Short found (SLd_45irzHw) is from @conorharris, not RP.
